661.candidate_text:
let go :: Int -> [String] -> NumberedLines
      go _ [] = []
      go counter (x : xs) =
        let mNumbering = if shouldNumber x then Just counter else Nothing
            newCounter = if shouldIncr x then counter + 1 else counter
         in (mNumbering, x) : go newCounter xs
